rows.label: qev065101_MSG0001
rows.name: ...You're back. I was waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Surprised that a sinner who deceived you
has come to meet you alone like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lara Nara told me... that he would
let me go free, so I should try
talking to you once. So here I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Say, do you know? What should I do now
that I have betrayed the Growth? What in the
world am I supposed to do... do you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0010
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell her to fight the
Growth together with you.

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Turn her away, saying it's meaningless
unless she thinks for herself.

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0005
rows.name:
The joy of living you taught me, the
workings of life— I do have the
desire to protect that within me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0006
rows.name:
But that means bearing my fangs against
my sisters who belong to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Can I... really do that?
Hurt my Definian sisters...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0009
rows.name:
—No, that's not it. Leaving my sisters to
unknowingly pile up sins just as they are
ordered is the greatest sin of all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0010
rows.name: Think for myself... I see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0011
rows.name:
We Definians have lived without our
own will, simply following orders...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Deceiving people without a single
thought, trapping them... We have
taken countless precious lives...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0013
rows.name:
If I am to walk a new path... I must
think for myself and walk forward
from now on, just like you all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0015
rows.name: What I need to do right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0016
rows.name:
That is... to first liberate my
sisters from their sinful missions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Say, won't you cooperate with me? The
only ones in this city I can rely on
are you, who know my true identity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm begging you... Right now, while
Fortun is coming up to the surface,
we should be able to open a path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0019
rows.name:
To help someone like me who
has done nothing but deceive
you all... Thank you, truly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0020
rows.name:
I finally understand why Lara
Nara told me to go and see you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for more details about Fortun.

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0060
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask about her relationship
with Lara Nara.

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Fortun, the wise one who has continued to
issue directives to us since the distant
past... I have never seen her figure either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0022
rows.name:
But right now, she should be guarded
by my sisters and transported somewhere
in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0023
rows.name:
He's... a terrible person who inflicted
the punishment of freedom upon me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0024
rows.name:
He told me he would take full responsibility if
anything happened, and granted me action privileges
no different from an ordinary citizen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0025
rows.name:
...I can't betray that kind of
trust, can I? I will absolutely
accomplish what I must do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Fortun, the wise one who has
continued to issue directives
to us since the distant past...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0027
rows.name:
I have never seen her figure either, but... Right
now, she should be guarded by my sisters and
transported somewhere in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0028
rows.name:
If we can do something about her,
we might be able to free my sisters
from this wicked curse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please, track down the Definian platoon
and snatch Fortun away from my sisters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Right now, Fortun should be transported
across the White Tree Continent while
being guarded by elites.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0031
rows.name:
If we miss this chance, the opportunity
to make contact with her will disappear...
Please, take her away no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I can feel it... You brought
Fortun here, didn't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I see... So this is what has
managed us for so long as our
king, as our mother...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Even though it is the one who made
us pile up our sins... I can't help
but feel a nostalgic warmth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what she's going to do now.

rows.label: qev065101_JNK0040
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev065101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that she didn't look
like that big of a deal.

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0035
rows.name:
First is analyzing the information... I suppose. If
I do not grasp everything about the Definians, I
won't be able to suppress my ever-changing sisters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0036
rows.name:
It is my first time seeing her
form as well. I never thought
she was such a tiny sphere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0037
rows.name:
...However, this is undoubtedly our
king who has conquered countless planets.
You shouldn't let your guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0038
rows.name:
At any rate, I will try
speaking directly with Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065101_MSG0039
rows.name:
And I will definitely stop my
sisters' sins. No matter what
it takes, absolutely—I promise.[ST:wait ]
